name: W-12 agent documents the ungrounded-answer refusal contract per the architecture (refuses to speculate or hallucinate)
command: grep -qi 'ungrounded\|refusal\|refuse' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && grep -qi 'don.t have grounding\|no grounding' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && echo documented 1>&2
